title: Pee Safe × Smriti Mandhana — #BeInYourComfortZone
description: Pee Safe partnered with cricketer Smriti Mandhana to champion everyday comfort and break the silence around women's intimate wellness. The film pairs candid, confidence-led performance with bright, energetic framing, turning a taboo subject into a spirited, female-first statement built for social sharing and brand recall.

title: Aarohi Loans for Women
description: Aarohi Loans for Women reframes borrowing as empowerment, following women turning long-held ambitions into reality. Shot through intimate, real-world vignettes and carried by an uplifting score, the brand film positions Aarohi as a trusted partner in financial independence rather than a lender of last resort.

title: Centrum × Kajal Aggarwal — Chief Claims Advocate
description: Centrum appointed Kajal Aggarwal as its Chief Claims Advocate to demystify daily nutritional gaps. The commercial leans on credibility-driven direction and a composed on-screen presence, balancing star appeal with product clarity to earn the confidence of health-conscious households.

title: Vertical Campaign Reel
description: Built for mobile-first discovery, this vertical campaign reel pairs tight, energetic framing with a syncopated edit. Distilled into seconds of social-native motion, it rewards repeat viewing and turns a single campaign beat into a shareable, feed-ready moment.

title: Armani Exchange × Kartik Aaryan — Fall 2024 Watch Collection
description: Armani Exchange cast Kartik Aaryan for its Fall 2024 watch collection in a rhythm-driven fashion film. Editorial precision meets a metropolitan mood as product hero shots intercut with the actor's effortless charm, framing the watches as essential, everyday luxury for a youthful audience.

title: Collaboration Still
description: Pulled from the set, this behind-the-scenes collaboration still is composed for a clean Instagram grid. The frame carries an easy, on-set mood that pairs the studio's craft with a partner brand in a single editorial composition — spontaneous in feel, considered in execution.

title: PocketFM — Audio Stories Reel
description: PocketFM's audio-fiction world comes alive in this vertical Instagram reel. Sound-led editing and expressive motion dramatise the platform's immersive storytelling, converting passive scrollers into listeners with a punchy, platform-native tease engineered for instant curiosity and tap-through.

title: Square Campaign Post
description: Composed for Instagram's grid, this square campaign frame favours brand clarity with a confident, editorial mood. The still extends the campaign's visual language into the feed with restraint and polish, reading instantly at thumbnail scale without surrendering its composure.

title: Square Lifestyle Post
description: Balancing product clarity with a warm, lived-in mood, this square lifestyle post is built for the Instagram grid. The frame translates a larger campaign idea into one self-contained image designed to hold attention at feed scale while keeping its editorial ease.

title: Square Brand Post
description: Styled for the feed, this square brand post pairs calm composition with a confident sense of colour. The still carries the production's visual identity into social with restraint, built to register at a glance and reward a closer look with its quiet confidence.

title: Collaboration Set Still
description: Captured on set, this candid collaboration still frames a partnership moment between the studio and a brand. The image holds on-set energy that feels alive rather than staged — polished, yet unhurried in its execution.

title: Collaboration Grid Still
description: With a relaxed, working-shoot mood, this collaboration grid still is composed for Instagram. The frame captures a candid brand moment, balancing finish with the spontaneity of a live production and the easy rapport of a shared creative partnership.

title: Square Campaign Still
description: Stylised with clean light and confident framing, this square campaign still distils the production's tone into one grid-ready frame. Built to hold attention at feed scale, it keeps its editorial calm while carrying the campaign's intent in a single image.

title: Collaboration Post
description: Pairing the studio with a partner brand in one grid-ready frame, this square collaboration post balances both identities with a relaxed, editorial mood. It catches a behind-the-moment feel from the set rather than a posed finale, keeping the partnership front and centre.

title: Vertical Brand Reel
description: Engineered for the feed, this vertical brand reel uses brisk pacing and clean, mobile-first composition to land a campaign beat in seconds. The edit is built around retention and shareability, translating a brand moment into scroll-stopping motion that invites a second watch.

title: Vertical Social Cut
description: Tuned for discovery, this vertical social cut layers rhythmic editing with confident, social-native framing. Compressed into a few seconds of energetic, feed-ready motion, it is crafted to earn a tap and travel across shares and saves without losing its polish.

title: Vicks Roll On + Inhaler Ad — ft. Guneet Sandhu
description: Vicks brought fast relief to the feed with a punchy YouTube Shorts cut featuring Guneet Sandhu. In under a minute, snappy edits and relatable congestion-era humour demonstrate the Roll On and Inhaler's on-the-go comfort, built for thumb-stopping recall and instant mobile-first brand association.

title: Square Brand Still
description: Favouring clarity and an editorial calm, this square brand still is composed for the feed. The frame extends the shoot's visual language into a single, self-contained social image that reads cleanly at thumbnail scale and holds up on closer inspection.

title: Disney+ Hotstar — The Night Manager Pranks (Aditya Roy Kapur)
description: Disney+ Hotstar launched The Night Manager with a mischievous guerrilla promo starring Aditya Roy Kapur surprising unsuspecting hotel guests. Scripted comedy meets hidden-camera spontaneity to amplify the series' intrigue and the actor's charisma, engineered as a playful, shareable tease to drive streaming sign-ups.

title: Square Campaign Shoot
description: Lifted from a campaign shoot, this square still is framed for strong grid impact. Confident styling and clean light carry the brand story in one scroll-resistant image, composed to reward a second glance without demanding attention from a busy feed.

title: Square Social Still
description: Distilling a campaign's tone into one polished frame, this square social still is composed for Instagram. Restrained and brand-forward, it extends the visual narrative into the feed without competing for attention, letting product and mood carry the message.

title: Skinn Noura — A Gift From You, To You
description: Skinn's Noura fragrance is presented as a gift from you, to you in a sensorial brand film. Soft, feminine cinematography and a deliberate rhythm frame the scent as an act of self-love rather than occasion-wear luxury, positioning Noura as a daily, personal indulgence.

title: Dell Futurist — Make Music With Lost Stories On Alienware
description: Dell's Futurist initiative paired Alienware with electronic duo Lost Stories to turn high-performance hardware into music. The brand film follows the artists composing on the machines, merging product capability with creative ambition through tech-glossy visuals that position Alienware as the instrument for makers pushing what's next.

title: World Is Yours To Take — Sustainability Streetwear India
description: 'World Is Yours To Take' champions sustainability in Indian streetwear, following young creators reimagining fashion through conscious choices. Documentary warmth meets bold, street-styled visuals to frame responsible design as cultural ownership — encouraging a generation to wear its values and claim the future on its own terms.
